description_long: This object consists of a pair of black athletic shoes placed side by side on a rectangular wooden box. The shoes have a low-top design with rounded toes and visible stitching along the sides. The upper material appears to be synthetic or leather, with a matte finish and subtle textural details. Laces are present, arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the shoes have thick, slightly elevated soles. The shoes show no visible branding or logos, and the overall appearance is clean and well-maintained. The wooden box beneath the shoes is dark brown with a smooth, polished surface.
description: A pair of black low-top athletic shoes with laces, resting on a dark wooden box. The shoes are clean, matte, and show no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toes and laces of both shoes, with the shoes placed on a wooden box.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the shoe profile, sole thickness, and lacing details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel shape and back contours of both shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile and the side stitching of the shoes.
